pinCode.subject: Your Evenero login code
pinCode.title: Your login code
pinCode.body: Use this code to log in to Evenero:
pinCode.ignore: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

coHostInvite.subject: 🎉 You're invited to co-host {{eventName}}!
coHostInvite.title: You're a Co-Host!
coHostInvite.body: {{inviterName}} has invited you to help manage their event on Evenero.
coHostInvite.whatIsEvenero: Evenero is a photo & video sharing platform that helps collect memories from weddings, parties, and special events. Guests can upload their photos, and everyone can enjoy a shared gallery of the best moments.
coHostInvite.description: As a co-host, you can manage the event, view all uploads, moderate content, and download the complete photo collection. Your help is valuable!
coHostInvite.permissions: What you can do as co-host:
coHostInvite.permissionsList:
• View and download all photos & videos
• Approve or remove uploads
• Access event settings
• See the live slideshow
coHostInvite.dashboardNote: After logging in, you'll find this event on your dashboard.
coHostInvite.ignore: If you don't recognize the sender, you can safely ignore this email.

eventReminder.subject: 📸 Time to share your photos from {{eventName}}!
eventReminder.title: Ready to share your memories?
eventReminder.body: You set a reminder to upload and view photos from "{{eventName}}". The gallery is live and waiting for your photos!
eventReminder.uploadPrompt: Share your photos and videos from the event - help create a complete memory collection that everyone can enjoy.
eventReminder.viewOthers: See what others have already shared in the gallery and discover moments you might have missed!
eventReminder.downloadHint: You can download photos one at a time from the gallery.

reminderConfirmation.subject: Reminder set for {{eventName}}
reminderConfirmation.title: Reminder confirmed!
reminderConfirmation.body: We'll send you a reminder with the gallery link for "{{eventName}}".
reminderConfirmation.galleryLink: In the meantime, you can view the gallery here:
reminderConfirmation.changeReminder: Changed your mind? Just ignore the reminder email when it arrives.

zipReady.subject: Your photo download is ready
zipReady.title: Your download is ready
zipReady.body: Your photo collection from "{{eventName}}" has been packaged and is ready for download.
zipReady.expiry: This download link expires in 24 hours.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Evenero!
welcome.title: Welcome to Evenero
welcome.body: Thanks for joining Evenero! We're excited to help you collect and share memories from your events.

features.title: What you can do:
features.create: Create events for weddings, parties, and more
features.collect: Collect photos from all your guests
